title: lithocarpus siamensis
intro: Lithocarpus siamensis, also known as the Siam nut oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus siamensis include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and nuts are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various ailments.
